info.title: Customer Feedback API
info.description: RESTful API for customer feedback management system

get.description: List admin audit logs with filters

post.description: Development-only: initialize or update admin account
Bind email to anonymous feedback for follow-up
Add admin reply to feedback thread

get.description: Get feedback detail with statistics (admin only)

tagIds.description: Array of tag IDs to set

post.description: Mark feedback as duplicate of another

get.description: List feedback with filters and pagination

post.description: Add customer follow-up message to feedback thread

get.description: Get feedback thread conversation (for user: only their own, for admin: any)
